zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hody於1441年之前出生在英國時，他的父親Sir John Hody44歲，母親Elizabeth Jewe41歲。他於大約1459年與Eleanor Malet在英國英格蘭多瑟特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他於1486年被列為chief baron of the exchequer 。他去世於1524年6月18日在他的家鄉，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特皮爾達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hody于1441年之前出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir John Hody44岁，母亲Elizabeth Jewe41岁。他于大约1459年与Eleanor Malet在英国英格兰多瑟特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他于1486年被列为chief baron of the exchequer 。他去世于1524年6月18日在他的家乡，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特皮爾達。

nameMeanings.name: Hody
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Caitlin, Conor, Declan, Thomas Patrick.
Irish (Louth): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEochaidh ‘descendant of Eochaidh’, a variant of Eachaidh, a personal name meaning ‘horseman’ (a derivative of each ‘horse’).
Norwegian: habitational name from a farmstead named Hoøy from Old Norse hór ‘high’ + ey ‘island’. This surname is very rare in Norway.

variants.name: Hoy
meanings: English (Essex): nickname for a sailor, from Middle Dutch hoey ‘cargo ship’.
Danish (Høy): nickname for a tall person, from høj ‘high’.

variants.name: Haughey
meanings: Irish (Tyrone): variant of Hoey from Ó hEachaidh. Compare McCaughey .

variants.name: Haugh
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Connor, Eamon.
Irish (Clare): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEachach ‘descendant of Eochu’, a personal name which is probably a pet form of Eochaidh, Eachaidh (see Hoey ).

Scottish and English: from northern Middle English and Older Scots halh, haugh ‘a piece of flat alluvial land by the side of a river, typically one deposited in a bend’, also ‘river-meadow land’; either topographic for someone who lived near such a feature or habitational for someone who came from one of several places in Scotland and northern England called Haugh.

variants.name: Haughn
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEacháin ‘descendant of Eachán’, probably a diminutive of Eachaidh (see Hoey ).

variants.name: Xu
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese: Wei, Jing, Jian, Ming, Li, Yi, Hui, Bin, Gang, Hong, Ping, Jin, Min, Chong, You, Chang, Hu, Neng, Shen, Yiming, Yiping.  Vietnamese Long, Hao, Lan, Hai, Bian, Buu, Cong, Dai, Mai, Nu, Quan, Thi.

Mandarin form of the surname 徐, meaning ‘gradually, slowly’ in Chinese: (i) from Xu (徐), the name of a state (covering present-day Jiangsu and Anhui province) originally granted to Ruo Mu, son of an official called Bo Yi during the reign of Xia Yu, the first king of the Xia dynasty (2070–1600  BC ). The state was destroyed by the state of Chu during the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ) but later restored and eventually annexed by the state of Wu in 512  BC . After its annihilation, the name of the state was adopted as a surname. (ii) borne by the descendants of the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). The Xu family was one of the six clans of the Shang dynasty that were sent to the state of Lu after the annihilation of the Shang dynasty. (iii) surname borne by descendants of Xu Zhi Gao (徐知誥), an alternative name of Li Sheng, the founder of the state of Southern Tang (937–975  AD ). (iv) a surname of the Xu (徐) family from the Di ethnic group in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hody was born before 1441, in England, his father, Sir John Hody, was 44 and his mother, Elizabeth Jewe, was 41. He married Eleanor Malet about 1459, in Dorset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. In 1486, his occupation is listed as chief baron of the exchequer . He died on 18 June 1524, in his hometown, and was buried in Pilsdon, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hody est né avant 1441, à Angleterre, son père, Sir John Hody, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Jewe, avait 41 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor Malet environ 1459, à Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. En 1486, sa profession de son indiquée est chief baron of the exchequer . Il est décédé le 18 juin 1524, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Pilsdon, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hody vor 1441 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Hody 44 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Jewe 41. Er hat um 1459 in Dorset, England, United Kingdom Eleanor Malet geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. 1486 ist sein Beruf als chief baron of the exchequer  aufgeführt. Er starb am 18. Juni 1524 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pilsdon, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hody è nato il prima del 1441 nel England, il suo padre, Sir John Hody, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Jewe, aveva 41 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor Malet circa 1459, nel Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Nel 1486, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief baron of the exchequer . Morì il 18 giugno 1524, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Pilsdon, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Hodyが1441年以前にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir John Hodyは44歳，母Elizabeth Jeweは41歳であった。約1459年にイギリスイギリスドールセトでEleanor Maletと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。1486年，職業はchief baron of the exchequer と記録されている。彼は1524年6月18日に故郷で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトピルスドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hody(이)가 1441년 이전 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Hody(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Jewe(은)는 41세였다. 그는 대략 1459년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트에서 Eleanor Malet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 1486년, 그의 직업은 chief baron of the exchequer 이었다. 그는 1524년 6월 18일 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 피즈던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hody nasceu antes 1441, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Hody, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Jewe, tinha 41 anos. Ele casou-se com Eleanor Malet aproximadamente 1459, em Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Em 1486, sua profissão aparece como chief baron of the exchequer . Ele faleceu em 18 de junho de 1524, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Pilsdon, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hody родился перед 1441 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Hody было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Jewe, 41. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor Malet около 1459 г. в местности дорсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. В 1486 году он работал по профессии chief baron of the exchequer . Он умер 18 июня 1524 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности пилсдон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Hody nació antes de 1441, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Hody, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Jewe, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Eleanor Malet aproximadamente 1459, en Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. En 1486, su ocupación registrada era chief baron of the exchequer . Murió el 18 de junio de 1524, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Pilsdon, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
